title: Spyros Balafas
text:
[cite_start]I am a Biostatistician and Data Scientist at the Groningen Research Institute of Pharmacy (GRIP), University of Groningen[cite: 9]. [cite_start]My research focuses on the development of methodological and computational frameworks for modelling the dynamics of high-dimensional time-series and sparse network inference[cite: 38, 39].
[cite_start]I have extensive experience in clinical, pharmacoepidemiological, and psychological research, providing statistical consulting and developing open-source tools for reproducible research[cite: 10, 13, 30].
Research Interests: * [cite_start]Network-based methods for intensive longitudinal data[cite: 15, 84]. * [cite_start]Sparse Hierarchical Vector Autoregression (SHIVAR)[cite: 87, 88]. * [cite_start]Causal inference and time-to-event modelling[cite: 12, 15].
